description_of_loss: On 05/27/2025, our insured, Jason R. Dietrich, sustained injuries in a slip-and-fall incident at 9800 Hillwood Parkway, Fort Worth, TX 76177, a property owned or managed by Summit Contracting Inc.. Jason R. Dietrich slipped on an unmarked wet floor while crossing the lobby and fell, sustaining injuries to the right wrist and shoulder.
